title.en: Latest ever winner, comeback and controversy - Senegal's remarkable exit
title.zh-CN: 最新的赢家、卷土重来和争议--塞内加尔引人注目的退出

summary.en: Late drama, controversy, history and heartbreak - the World Cup last-32 tie between Belgium and Senegal had everything.
summary.zh-CN: 晚期戏剧，争议，历史和心碎-比利时和塞内加尔之间的世界杯最后32平局拥有一切。

title.en: Why did England struggle against DR Congo - and what can they learn?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰为什么要与刚果民主共和国作斗争-他们能学到什么？

summary.en: A tactical analysis of England's victory over DR Congo - and what it might teach them for their next World Cup match against Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 对英格兰战胜刚果民主共和国的战术分析-以及它可能会教会他们下一场对阵墨西哥的世界杯比赛。

title.en: Goalscorer Balogun sent off for USA

summary.en: USA forward Folarin Balogun is shown a straight red card for a challenge on Bosnia-Herzegovina's Tarik Muharemovic during their World Cup match.
summary.zh-CN: 美国前锋Folarin Balogun在世界杯比赛中为波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的Tarik Muharemovic出示了一张红牌。

title.en: Balogun gives USA deserved lead over Bosnia
title.zh-CN: Balogun让美国在波斯尼亚获得应有的领先优势

summary.en: Folarin Balogun gives the USA the lead against Bosnia-Herzegovina in their round of 32 match at the San Francisco Bay Area Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: Folarin Balogun在旧金山湾区体育场举行的32轮比赛中领先美国对阵波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那。

title.en: USA beat Bosnia despite Balogun red card LIVE!
title.zh-CN: 尽管Balogun红牌现场直播，美国还是击败了波斯尼亚！

title.en: Belgium produce stunning comeback win against Senegal to reach last 16
title.zh-CN: 比利时在对阵塞内加尔的比赛中取得了令人惊叹的复出胜利，达到了最后16

summary.en: Youri Tielemans scored a controversial last-gasp extra-time penalty winner for Belgium to complete an incredible 3-2 comeback victory against Senegal in the last 32 of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 尤里·蒂勒曼斯（ Youri Tielemans ）为比利时赢得了一个有争议的最后一次加时赛点球，在世界杯的最后32场比赛中以令人难以置信的3-2战胜塞内加尔。

title.en: USA 2-0 Bosnia and Herzegovina: World Cup 2026 last 32 – live reaction
title.zh-CN: 美国2-0波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那： 2026年世界杯最后32场–现场反应

summary.en: ⚽️ Player guide | Golden Boot | Bracket | Mail BeauHello from San Francisco Bay Area Stadium, where as you might expect an extremely pro-USA crowd is filing in. There are certainly more than enough...
summary.zh-CN: ⚽️ 球员指南| Golden Boot | Bracket | Mail BeauHello来自旧金山湾区体育场，您可能会期望那里有一群非常亲美的人群。肯定有足够多的……

title.en: Genuine superstar Kane produces his biggest England moment
title.zh-CN: 真正的超级巨星凯恩创造了他最大的英格兰时刻

summary.en: Harry Kane's England career is filled with great moments - his World Cup rescue act against DR Congo in Atlanta is his greatest, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
summary.zh-CN: 首席足球作家菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂（ Phil McNulty ）表示，哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）在英格兰的职业生涯充满了美好的时刻--他在亚特兰大对阵刚果民主共和国的世界杯救

title.en: All the angles of Kane's brilliant winner
title.zh-CN: 凯恩的辉煌胜利者的所有角度

summary.en: All the angles of Harry Kane's winning goal against DR Congo for England in their round of 32 game in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩在亚特兰大32轮比赛中为英格兰队对阵刚果民主共和国的胜利进球的所有角度。

title.en: Tielemans scores late extra-time penalty to send Belgium into last 16
title.zh-CN: Tielemans得分较晚的加时赛罚分，让比利时进入最后16名

summary.en: Belgium score two late goals to force extra time against Senegal where Youri Tielemans scores a late penalty following a VAR review as Belgium win 3-2 to reach the last 16.
summary.zh-CN: 比利时队打进两球，迫使对塞内加尔队加时赛， Youri Tielemans在VAR审查后得分，比利时队以3-2战胜最后16名。

title.en: Four die in Mexico City World Cup celebrations
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥城世界杯庆祝活动中有四人死亡

summary.en: More than one million people took to the streets of Mexico's capital on Tuesday to mark the country's win over Ecuador.
summary.zh-CN: 周二，超过一百万人走上墨西哥首都的街头，纪念该国战胜厄瓜多尔。

title.en: Tielemans scores late extra-time penalty in dramatic end to match
title.zh-CN: Tielemans在戏剧性的比赛结束时得分较晚的加时赛点球

summary.en: Youri Tielemans scores a dramatic late penalty in extra time to see Belgium advance to the last 16 after a 3-2 victory over Senegal in Seattle.
summary.zh-CN: 尤里·蒂勒曼斯（ Youri Tielemans ）在西雅图以3-2战胜塞内加尔后，在加时赛中获得了戏剧性的后期点球，看到比利时晋级到最后16强。

title.en: Sarr fires home to double Senegal's lead against Belgium
title.zh-CN: 萨尔在塞内加尔对比利时的比赛中取得双倍领先优势

summary.zh-CN: 伊斯梅拉·萨尔（ Ismaila Sarr ）展示了他的速度，在穆萨·尼亚哈特（ Moussa Niakhaté ）的长球结束时，将球猛击入网，使塞内加尔进一步控制他们的世界杯32轮对阵......

title.en: Concern over rise in online racist abuse at World Cup
title.zh-CN: 对世界杯期间在线种族主义虐待上升的担忧

summary.en: The Word Cup has suffered a 'significant increase' in the most serious examples of racist abuse online, Fifa's social media protection service (SMPS) has found.
summary.zh-CN: 国际足联的社交媒体保护服务（ SMPS ）发现， Word Cup在网上最严重的种族主义虐待事件中“大幅增加”。

title.en: United, free and brilliant - can anyone stop France masterclass?
title.zh-CN: 团结、自由、才华横溢--有人能阻止法国大师班吗？

summary.en: France boss Didier Deschamps urges caution despite watching his side dismantle Sweden to leave Les Bleus fans dreaming of winning the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 法国主教练迪迪埃·德尚（ Didier Deschamps ）敦促谨慎行事，尽管他看着自己的球队拆除瑞典队，让蓝军球迷梦想着赢得世界杯。
